title: cacalia elegans
intro: Cacalia elegans, also known as the Elegant Cacalia or Chinese Cacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the aster family (Asteraceae). It is widely used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Cacalia elegans include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Cacalia elegans is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
